name: Rally-X
description:
Rally-X is a maze-based driving game where the player controls a blue car navigating a scrolling, overhead maze. The objective is to collect all the flags scattered throughout the maze without being caught by red enemy cars. The maze is dynamically generated and scrolls continuously. 

The player car has a limited amount of fuel which depletes as the car moves. Fuel can be replenished by collecting special flags (Special Flags) or by maneuvering to a specific point on the map (the Rally-X flag). 

The enemy cars pursue the player car aggressively. The player car can emit a smokescreen behind it to temporarily impede the progress of enemy cars. Using the smokescreen consumes fuel. 

The game includes multiple rounds or levels. Each level has a different maze layout. The difficulty increases as the player progresses, with more enemy cars appearing and the enemy cars moving faster. A radar at the bottom of the screen displays the location of the player car, enemy cars, and remaining flags on the map. The maze wraps around on all sides. Points are awarded for collecting flags and completing rounds.
